title: cynanchum repandum
intro: Cynanchum repandum, also known as the Asian swallowwort or Chinese swallowwort, is a perennial plant species in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum repandum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cough and sore throat, and treat respiratory infections. Cynanchum repandum can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
